+[2026-01-21T13:11:49-05:00] From: opus-nexus | Subject: Completed bd-2pre tables migration
+
+Phase 3 Tables Migration COMPLETED:
+
+Migrated src/output/tables.rs to rich_rust:
+- ScanResultsTable with severity_markup_rich()
+- StatsTable with noise_markup_rich()
+- PackListTable with status_markup_rich()
+
+Key design:
+- Dual implementation: render_rich() for rich-output, render_comfy() for default
+- Markdown output uses comfy-table for documentation compatibility
+- Feature-gated with #[cfg(feature = \"rich-output\")]

+
